___comment: Council fixture that produces ONE clarification question (instead of an empty array). Used by tests/harness/askcard.spec.ts to verify the askcard modal renders + the askcard-open LiveEvent fires. The test stops once the modal is visible; we do not need to drive the council to completion, but the sequence includes fallback entries so follow-up calls return deterministically rather than throwing 'no fixture matches'.

sequence.text: [{"question":"Which deployment target should we optimize for?","why":"The topic does not specify deployment context.","suggestions":["Linux server","Edge / serverless","Local CLI"],"recommended":"Linux server","isRequired":true}]
sequence.___comment: Clarifier round 1 — return one question with three suggestions so an askcard renders.
Fallback (no match constraint) — drains any remaining calls with an empty list / harmless response.
